task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opens both the HVAC maintenance manual (.odt) in a word processor and the restructuring guide (.txt) in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'hvac_maintenance_manual.odt' open in a word processing application (like Calligra Words or LibreOffice) and 'manual_restructuring_guide.txt' open in a text editor.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 8 main sections in the document have been rearranged into the correct sequence according to the guide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document shows the sections ordered correctly: Introduction..., System Overview..., Monthly..., Quarterly..., Semi-Annual..., Annual..., Troubleshooting..., Parts and Supplies Reference.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 8 main section titles are formatted as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main section titles are visually distinct (e.g., larger, bolded) and the style selector in the word processor toolbar displays 'Heading 1' when a main title is selected or visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the maintenance sub-tasks are formatted as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sub-tasks (e.g., Filter Inspection, Refrigerant Level Check) are formatted distinctly from the body text and main headings, and the style selector displays 'Heading 2' when a sub-task is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that a summary table with 4 columns and at least 6 rows is created at the end of the 'System Overview' section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table with exactly 4 columns and 6 or more rows is visible immediately following the text of the 'System Overview and Specifications' section, containing schedule data.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saves the updated document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' icon, uses the File > Save menu, or the document title bar no longer shows an 'unsaved changes' indicator (like an asterisk) at the end of the task.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the word processor GUI to edit the document rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the word processor interface (selecting text, clicking formatting buttons, inserting tables) rather than a terminal window executing python or sed commands.

integrity.description: Verify the table is a native word processor table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table has visible cell boundaries, gridlines, or table formatting controls are active, proving it is not just plain text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just copy-paste a pre-formatted document from an external source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step process of moving text blocks, applying heading styles, and inserting the table manually within the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Correct section order: 1. Introduction and Safety Precautions, 2. System Overview and Specifications, 3. Monthly Inspection Procedures, 4. Quarterly Maintenance Procedures, 5. Semi-Annual Maintenance Procedures, 6. Annual Maintenance Procedures, 7. Troubleshooting Guide, 8. Parts and Supplies Reference. Sub-tasks to be formatted as Heading 2 include: Filter Inspection, Refrigerant Level Check, Coil Cleaning Procedure, Belt and Bearing Inspection, Electrical Component Testing.
